title: One Block Random Challenges
description:
This Plugin Gives You Many Exciting Random Challenges Specially Made For ONE BLOCK However This Also Works On Normal World Just Install it And Enjoy 
I've also made a Separate Survival Challenges Plugin Check out my profile to find That 
Thanx for download
body:
This Plugin Gives You Many Exciting Random Challenges Specially Made For ONE BLOCK However This Also Works On Normal World Just Install it And Enjoy 
I've Also Made Survival Challenge Mod To USe In Survival World Check Out My Profile to Download That Too 

After Entering the Game Type /challenge start to start the challenge 
To view your Profress Do /challenge progress 

Installation Guide - make paper 1.21.5 server and drag my plugin into plugins folder use via backward and via rewind to play with other game version
